LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS CERTAIN UNDERWRITERS AT LLOYDS MOTION FOR INTERLOCUTORY JUDGMENT OF ABATEMENT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE, SECTION 597, IS GRANTED. IN THE ALTERNATIVE THE COURT STAYS THIS ACTION PENDING FINALITY IN WING INFLATABLES, INC. V. CERTAIN UNDERWRITERS, SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT CASE NO. CGC-21-589722 (WING I). PURSUANT TO THIS ORDER, NO DISCOVERY OR TRIAL OF THE ISSUES IN THIS CASE (WING II) WILL ENSUE UNTIL WING I IS FINAL. THE COURT GRANTS THE UNDERWRITERS REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING) ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, COURT REPORTER: RAQUEL SHARP, CSR #10619, 925-226-8222 RAQUEL@TRANSCRIPTLEGAL.COM, REPORTED (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Abate And Or Stay
Off Calendar Jul-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael T. Boardman, Esq., BAKER & McKENZIE LLP 310 201 4728 michael.boardman@bakermckenzie.com Attorneys for Plaintiff WING INFLATABLES, INC.,
Michael J. Hartley, Esq., Courtney A. Palko, Esq., BAUTE CROCHETIERE HARTLEY & McCOY LLP (213) 630-5000 mhartley@bautelaw.com cpalko@bautelaw.com Attorneys for Defendants CERTAIN UNDERWRITERS AT LLOYDS, Subscribing to Insurance Policy Number TLH001130428
Raquel Sharp, CSR #10619, 925-226-8222 raquel@transcriptlegal.com., Court reporter

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CERTAIN UNDERWRITERS AT LLOYDS, SUBSCRIBING TO INSURANCE POLICY NUMBER TLH001130428 Motion To Abate And Or Stay

Defendants Certain Underwriters at Lloyds motion for interlocutory judgment of abatement pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure, section 597, is granted. In the alternative the court stays this action pending finality in Wing Inflatables, Inc. v. Certain Underwriters, San Francisco Superior Court Case No. CGC-21-589722 (Wing I). Pursuant to this order, no discovery or trial of the issues in this case (Wing II) will ensue until Wing I is final.

The court grants the Underwriters request for judicial notice.

(see word minutes for complete ruling)

Order is signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR #10619, 925-226-8222 raquel@transcriptlegal.com, Reported (301/CVA)
